playlist_strategy: A progressive cinematic journey through 80s-inspired electronic soundscapes, starting with a steady pulsing warm-up, building up to high-BPM darksynth peaks for intense lifting and cardio, and concluding with a melodic retrowave cool-down.

tracks.title: Neon Horizon
tracks.youtube_title: Neon Horizon 🌅 Ultimate Synthwave Workout Music | Warm Up
tracks.style_prompt: Mid-tempo chillwave format, A minor, 105 BPM. Lush pad intro building into a steady 80s drum machine groove. Clean analog synth arpeggios, warm deep electric bass line. Hi-fi production, cinematic atmosphere. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an athletic female stretching in a dimly lit industrial gym illuminated by neon pink and purple LED lights. Focused expression, shallow depth of field, high contrast, YouTube dark mode compatible.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your workout right with 'Neon Horizon'. This retro-inspired synthwave track provides the ultimate steady rhythm for stretching and warming up. Feel the 80s nostalgia push you into gear! 💜🔥🧘‍♀️ #synthwave #workoutmusic #retrowave

tracks.title: Grid Runner
tracks.youtube_title: Grid Runner 🏃‍♂️ High Energy Outrun Push | Cardio Session
tracks.style_prompt: Driving outrun, 118 BPM, C Minor. Hook opens immediately with an aggressive sawtooth bass sequence. Punchy 80s kick and snare, layered vintage synth melodies. Energetic driving groove with modern hi-fi clarity. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, dynamic shot of a fitness model running on a treadmill. Cyberpunk blue and magenta lighting reflecting off sweat. Intense pushing expression. Shallow depth of field, strong cinematic contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Hit your stride with 'Grid Runner', an outrun synthwave anthem designed to lock in your cardio pace. The driving basslines will keep your feet moving and energy high throughout your run! ⚡👟🔊 #outrun #cardiomusic #synthwave

tracks.title: Cybernetic Pump
tracks.youtube_title: Cybernetic Pump 🦾 Intense Darksynth | Heavy Lifting
tracks.style_prompt: Heavy darksynth, 124 BPM, E Minor. Instantly opens with a gritty, distorted synth riff. Thunderous, compressed electronic drums and a menacing sub-bass. Aggressive groove suitable for lifting iron. Hi-fi modern dark retro sound. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a muscular athlete gripping a heavy barbell. Dramatic blood red and black shadow lighting. Intensely powerful and aggressive facial expression. Sweat details, shallow depth of field, striking contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Fuel your heavy lifting session with 'Cybernetic Pump'. This gritty darksynth track delivers aggressive basslines and heavy beats perfectly synced for crushing your personal records. Lift heavier! 🦾🩸🏋️ #darksynth #liftingmusic #gymmotivation

tracks.title: Velocity Overdrive
tracks.youtube_title: Velocity Overdrive 🚀 130 BPM Synthwave | HIIT Training
tracks.style_prompt: High-tempo synthwave, 130 BPM, G Minor. Punchy, fast-paced 80s drum intro transitioning into rapid 16th-note arpeggiated synths. Fat, bouncing synth bass. High energy curve with explosive drops perfectly paced for HIIT intervals. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium back-lit shot of a female athlete performing high-intensity battle ropes. Vivid laser green and deep blue lighting. Sweaty, exhilarated expression. High contrast, dynamic motion blur, YouTube dark mode ready.
tracks.youtube_description: Push past your limits with 'Velocity Overdrive'. Clocking in at 130 BPM, this explosive synthwave banger is structured for intense HIIT intervals and fast-paced circuit training. Don't stop moving! ⏱️🔥🚀 #hiitworkout #synthwave #130bpm

tracks.title: Titan Blueprint
tracks.youtube_title: Titan Blueprint 🦍 Epic Dark Electro | Peak Power
tracks.style_prompt: Epic cyberpunk electro, 120 BPM, D Minor. Cinematic rise intro dropping into massive brass synth stabs. Heavy industrial percussion and crushing wobble bass. Huge, wide hi-fi mix designed for absolute peak power moments. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, low angle awe-inspiring shot of a massive bodybuilder mid-lift. Amber gold dramatic backlighting against pitch black. Expression of raw unstoppable dominance. Exceptional sharpness, high contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Unleash your ultimate strength with 'Titan Blueprint'. Huge cinematic synth stabs and industrial beats provide the perfect soundtrack for hitting your 1-rep max. This is peak power. 🦍🔥⛓️ #cyberpunkmusic #powerlifting #epicworkout

tracks.title: Neon Blood
tracks.youtube_title: Neon Blood 🩸 Most Aggressive Darksynth | PR Crusher
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial darksynth, 128 BPM, F Minor. Instant heavy bass drop intro. Relentless galloping bassline, eerie synth bells, and pounding heavy toms. Maximum distortion and energy. Extremely aggressive, adrenaline-fueling hi-fi mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, extreme close-up of a sweaty face screaming in ferocious intensity mid-workout. Saturated crimson red and toxic green lighting. Gritty texture, highly emotional, perfect for dark mode CTR.
tracks.youtube_description: Shatter your PR with 'Neon Blood', the most aggressive track on the playlist. Relentless darksynth basslines and pounding drums designed to inject pure adrenaline into your veins. Go beast mode! 🩸💀🏋️‍♂️ #darksynth #prcrusher #industrial

tracks.title: Synthfire Sprint
tracks.youtube_title: Synthfire Sprint 🔥 Insane 140 BPM | Fat-Burning Cardio
tracks.style_prompt: Fast outrun, 140 BPM, A# Minor. immediate rapid 16th-note synth sequence. Fast driving 4-on-the-floor beat with heavy clap tracks. Screaming lead synth solo section. High octane, bright outrun aesthetic, hi-fi production. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, profile shot of an athlete sprinting at top speed on a track. Bright orange and pulsing cyan lighting. Breathless determination and extreme focus. Strong motion blur on the background, sharp subject.
tracks.youtube_description: Hit top speed with 'Synthfire Sprint'. At a blazing 140 BPM, this high-octane outrun track is formulated for max-effort sprints and intense fat-burning cardio sessions. Keep the pace! 🏃‍♀️💨🔥 #140bpm #sprintmusic #outrun

tracks.title: Iron Resolve
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Resolve ⚙️ Gritty Synthwave | Core & Endurance
tracks.style_prompt: Mid-tempo darksynth, 110 BPM, B Minor. Opens with a heavy, crunchy snare and kick groove. Deep sub bass and sweeping analog synth strings. A grinding, powerful rhythm meant for sustained physical endurance. Clean hi-fi mix. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, wide shot of an athlete holding a difficult calisthenics pose (like a planche). Steel grey and deep blue studio lighting. Stoic, resilient expression. High definition, dramatic shadows.
tracks.youtube_description: Grind through the toughest parts of your workout with 'Iron Resolve'. This mid-tempo dark electro track provides a steady, unrelenting beat perfect for core training and grueling endurance sets. ⚙️💪🛡️ #endurancetraining #synthwave #coreworkout

tracks.title: Ozone Taper
tracks.youtube_title: Ozone Taper 🌌 Smooth Retrowave | Post-Workout Cool Down
tracks.energy_curve: gentle tapering off from high energy
tracks.style_prompt: Dreamwave/Retrowave, 95 BPM, C Major. Opens with dreamy, wide chorus synth chords. Soft vintage drum machine rhythm and gentle electric piano melodies. Relaxing, atmospheric vibe transitioning out of workout intensity. Hi-fi. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium shot of a fitness model resting on a gym bench, wiping off sweat with a towel. Soft teal and pastel pink lighting. Relaxed, accomplished, and peaceful expression. Shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Bring your heart rate down with 'Ozone Taper'. This smooth and atmospheric dreamwave track is the perfect transition from an intense workout to a relaxing cool-down and stretching routine. Breathe easy. 🌌🧘‍♂️🎧 #dreamwave #cooldown #retrowave

tracks.title: Recovery Protocol
tracks.youtube_title: Recovery Protocol 🧬 Ambient Synth | Deep Stretching
tracks.style_prompt: Ambient synthwave, 80 BPM implied (beatless), F Major. Opens with ethereal ambient drones and heavily reverberated 80s synth washes. No percussion. Extremely calm, expansive soundscape for deep muscle recovery and meditation. Hi-fi. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, wide shot of an empty, dark gym or studio corner with a person sitting in a deep lotus stretch. Deep midnight blue ambient lighting. Exuding a zen, peaceful aura. High aesthetic quality.
tracks.youtube_description: Finalize your training with 'Recovery Protocol', an ambient beatless synthscape crafted for deep stretching, yoga, and meditation. Let your muscles recover and your mind reset. You earned it. 🧬🧘‍♀️🌌 #ambientmusic #stretching #recovery
